overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a panoramic view of Night City. The scene captures a highway interchange cutting through arid badlands terrain in the foreground, leading toward a dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers under a clear blue sky. Vehicles move along the elevated highway while the camera maintains a steady elevated observation point.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange at city outskirts transitioning to urban downtown

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary aerial position overlooking the highway and city skyline

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic glass skyscrapers with distinctive curved and angular architecture forming the city center
multi-lane curved highway elevated on concrete pillars carrying traffic toward the city
complex road junction with ramps and overpasses connecting different road levels
low-rise industrial buildings and warehouses with flat roofs and utilitarian design
dry desert landscape with brown earth, sparse vegetation, and scattered debris in the foreground

segments.scene_description: A stationary aerial view captures the transition from arid wasteland to futuristic metropolis. The elevated highway curves through the desert terrain in the foreground, carrying sparse vehicle traffic toward the gleaming glass skyscrapers of the city center rising in the distance. Industrial structures occupy the left midground while the clear sky dominates above, creating a stark contrast between the natural desert and urban development.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady aerial transition from a desolate arid wasteland toward the towering skyline of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a wide view of the desert terrain, where an elevated highway curves through the dry landscape and carries sparse vehicle traffic. As the camera maintains its observation point, the scene shifts focus from the industrial structures in the midground toward the gleaming glass and steel skyscrapers rising in the distance. The perspective finally emphasizes the stark contrast between the natural badlands and the dense urban development under a vast, clear blue sky.
